🔍 Eval 抽样可视化 — stage2_ckpt

上半部：整体指标 + 业界 SOTA 对比 · 下半部：每个任务分层抽 3 best · 4 random · 3 worst 渲染卡片。
RefCOCO 卡片含 GT 框 预测框 叠加显示。

📊 整体结果 + SOTA 对比

本次评测对象: stage2_ckpt (step 8088)
训练配置: Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct + SigLIP2-SO400M + ProjectorWithNorm + LoRA
训练数据: 详见 stage2-v1/README.md 或 stage2-v2/README.md

🏆 vs 业界主流 VL 模型

参考的都是 7B-72B 全参 finetune 模型；我们是 1.5B base + LoRA 18M-78M trainable， 参数量小 4-50×，训练数据少 1000-10000×，差距主要来自这两项。

TaskMetric我们 对照模型对照值备注 对照模型对照值备注
refcoco_val Acc@0.5 21.20% LLaVA-1.5-7B30%7B 全参，无专项 grounding 训练 Shikra-7B87%7B 全参 + 专项 grounding
Qwen-VL-7B88%7B 全参，含动态分辨率 + 大量 grounding 数据 Qwen2.5-VL-72B94%72B 全参，SOTA
GPT-4o80%通用模型 —
refcoco_testA Acc@0.5 23.30% LLaVA-1.5-7B32%— Qwen-VL-7B92%—
Qwen2.5-VL-72B94%SOTA —
refcoco_testB Acc@0.5 15.40% LLaVA-1.5-7B28%— Qwen-VL-7B84%—
Qwen2.5-VL-72B91%SOTA —

GPT-4V88-92%— —

Qwen2.5-VL-72B84%SOTA —

📙 6. NoCaps · 长 caption (word_recall 越高越好)

整体指标: avg_gen_length=131.265 · repetition_rate=0.00% · avg_word_recall=0.276 · distinct_word_ratio=12.52%
🟢 best 高分案例 (模型擅长) 3 个
#63 · all · len=86
recall 0.58
🟢 GT references (前 3 条 / 共 10)
• A fire hydrant is red with white caps.
• A red and white fire hydrant is on a grass field.
• A red and white fire hydrant in the grass.
🔵 模型生成 (86 词, max_run=1)
In the center of the image, a fire hydrant stands prominently on a patch of vibrant green grass. The hydrant, painted in a striking combination of red and white, is equipped with two nozzles. The top nozzle is white, while the bottom one is red, creating a striking contrast against the hydrant's red body. The hydrant is slightly tilted to the right, adding a dynamic element to the scene. In the background, a solitary tree can be seen, providing a natural backdrop to this urban object.
#76 · all · len=144
recall 0.50
🟢 GT references (前 3 条 / 共 10)
• a small yellow car with a black hood parked on the right side of the street
• Yellow rally car parked on curb with men around it¬
• A yellow and black car parked on the side of the road.
🔵 模型生成 (144 词, max_run=1)
The image captures a vibrant scene on a city street. Dominating the frame is a yellow car, parked on the right side of the street. The car is adorned with a black roof, adding a touch of contrast to its bright exterior. A white license plate is affixed to the front of the car, bearing the text "LISKE RALLY TEAM U7993". In the background, a group of people can be seen, their faces blurred, adding an air of mystery to the scene. They are standing on the sidewalk, their attention seemingly focused on the parked car. The street itself is lined with trees, their green leaves adding a touch of nature to the urban setting. Buildings rise in the distance, their windows reflecting the world around them. The image is a snapshot of everyday life, a moment frozen in time on a city street.
#125 · all · len=149
recall 0.50
🟢 GT references (前 3 条 / 共 10)
• a wooden blade ceiling fan with four lights
• A fan with wooden blades hangs from a ceiling in a purple painted room.
• A silver and wood ceiling fan with the lights on.
🔵 模型生成 (149 词, max_run=1)
The image captures a moment in a room, dominated by a ceiling fan that hangs from the ceiling. The fan, painted in a shade of gray, is equipped with three blades, two of which are silver and one is black. The blades are arranged in a triangular formation, with the silver blades pointing upwards and the black blade pointing downwards. The fan is not alone in the room. It is accompanied by a light fixture, which is also gray in color. The light fixture is adorned with three white frosted bulbs, casting a soft glow that illuminates the room. The room itself is painted in a soothing shade of purple, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. A window punctuates the wall in the background, hinting at a world beyond the room. The precise location of each object and their relative positions contribute to the overall harmony of the scene.
🟡 random 中等典型样本 4 个
#61 · all · len=115
recall 0.20
🟢 GT references (前 3 条 / 共 10)
• Three pots are on the side of a walkway in the grass.
• A grassy field with a flowerpot and a plant sitting there.
• A flowerpot is sitting next to a bird bath that is sitting on the grass next to a stone path.
🔵 模型生成 (115 词, max_run=1)
In the heart of a lush green lawn, a vibrant red and blue pot stands as a beacon of color. The pot, with its two sides painted in contrasting hues of red and blue, is adorned with a playful name that reads "ANDY".
